subject: (no subject)
body:
Hallo Jeffrey!
I'm very happy at work, working a lot, and absolutely no man in sight for
me.

Last night I went out with Mirna (see picture attached) and she knew my two
bosses... and not in a good way ;) That' the downside with living in a small
city, you find out things you never needed to know.

Biggest hug and much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
